# Bumpcraft

Bumpcraft is a pluggable semantic versioning engine for Node.js projects. It reads Conventional Commits from git history, determines the version bump (major/minor/patch), generates a changelog, and optionally creates a GitHub release.

## Install

```bash
npm install -g bumpcraft    # CLI
npm install bumpcraft        # library
```

## Quick Start (CLI)

```bash
bumpcraft init               # create .bumpcraftrc.json
bumpcraft validate           # preview what a release would do
bumpcraft release            # bump version, changelog, tag, GitHub release
bumpcraft release --dry-run  # preview only
```

## Quick Start (Library)

```typescript
import { runRelease, currentVersion } from 'bumpcraft'

// Get current version from package.json
const version = await currentVersion()

// Preview a release (dry run)
const preview = await runRelease({ dryRun: true })
// preview.bumpType: 'major' | 'minor' | 'patch' | 'none'
// preview.nextVersion: '1.2.0'
// preview.changelogOutput: '## 1.2.0 (2026-03-22)\n...'

// Actual release
const result = await runRelease()

// Release with options
const result = await runRelease({
  dryRun: false,              // actually write changes
  preRelease: 'beta',         // create 1.2.0-beta.1
  forceBump: 'minor',         // override: 'major' | 'minor' | 'patch'
  from: 'v1.0.0',            // analyze commits from this ref
  verbose: true,              // verbose logging
  overrideChangelog: '...',   // custom changelog text
})

// Release with specific commits (for release groups)
import { runReleaseWithCommits } from 'bumpcraft'
const result = await runReleaseWithCommits(['abc123 feat: add thing', 'def456 fix: bug'])
```

## Return Type

```typescript
{
  bumpType: 'major' | 'minor' | 'patch' | 'none'
  currentVersion: string       // e.g. '1.0.0'
  nextVersion: string | null   // e.g. '1.1.0', null if no release
  changelogOutput: string | null
  releaseResult: { url?: string; id?: string } | null
  dryRun: boolean
}
```

## Exported Types

```typescript
import type { BumpcraftPlugin, PipelineContext, ParsedCommit, BumpType, BumpcraftConfig } from 'bumpcraft'
import { SemVer, BumpcraftError, ErrorCode } from 'bumpcraft'
```

## Configuration (.bumpcraftrc.json)

```json
{
  "versionSource": "package.json",         // or "git-tag"
  "plugins": [
    "bumpcraft-plugin-conventional-commits",
    "bumpcraft-plugin-changelog-md",
    "bumpcraft-plugin-github"
  ],
  "branches": {
    "release": ["main", "master"],
    "preRelease": { "develop": "beta" }
  },
  "commitTypes": {
    "feat": "minor",
    "fix": "patch",
    "perf": "patch",
    "chore": "none",
    "docs": "none"
  },
  "policies": {
    "requireApproval": ["major"],
    "autoRelease": ["patch", "minor"],
    "freezeAfter": "friday 17:00",
    "maxBumpPerDay": 10
  }
}
```

## Conventional Commits Format

```
feat: add feature          → minor bump
fix: fix bug               → patch bump
feat!: breaking change     → major bump
BREAKING CHANGE: in body   → major bump
chore: update deps         → no bump
docs: update readme        → no bump
```

## CLI Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `bumpcraft release` | Full release pipeline |
| `bumpcraft release --dry-run` | Preview without changes |
| `bumpcraft release --force-bump major` | Force bump type |
| `bumpcraft release --pre-release beta` | Pre-release version |
| `bumpcraft release -i` | Interactive mode |
| `bumpcraft release --approve` | Override policy blocks |
| `bumpcraft validate` | Preview (alias for --dry-run) |
| `bumpcraft version` | Show current version |
| `bumpcraft changelog` | Generate changelog only |
| `bumpcraft history` | Query release history |
| `bumpcraft history --breaking` | Breaking changes only |
| `bumpcraft group create <name>` | Create release group |
| `bumpcraft group add <name>` | Add commits to group |
| `bumpcraft group release <name>` | Release a group |
| `bumpcraft plugins list` | List configured plugins |
| `bumpcraft init` | Create config file |

## REST API (run with `npm start`)

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| GET | /api/health | No | Health check |
| GET | /api/version | No | Current version |
| GET | /api/changelog/latest | No | Latest changelog |
| GET | /api/history | No | Release history |
| POST | /api/release | Yes | Trigger release |
| POST | /api/release/dry-run | Yes | Preview release |
| GET | /dashboard | No | Web UI |

Auth: Set `BUMPCRAFT_API_KEY` env var, send `X-API-Key` header.

## Environment Variables

| Variable | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `GITHUB_TOKEN` | GitHub PAT for creating releases |
| `GITHUB_REPOSITORY` | `owner/repo` format |
| `BUMPCRAFT_API_KEY` | API key for write endpoints |
| `BUMPCRAFT_AUTH_ALL` | Require key for all endpoints |
| `PORT` | API server port (default 3000) |

## Writing a Plugin

```typescript
import type { BumpcraftPlugin, PipelineContext } from 'bumpcraft'

const myPlugin: BumpcraftPlugin = {
  name: 'my-plugin',
  stage: 'changelog',  // 'parse' | 'resolve' | 'changelog' | 'release' | 'notify'
  async execute(context: PipelineContext): Promise<PipelineContext> {
    // Read from context, return modified context
    return { ...context, changelogOutput: 'custom changelog' }
  }
}
```
